name: generate_variants
description:
Generates design variants of existing screens. Explores alternative layouts, color schemes, fonts, or content with configurable creativity levels.

**Input Requirements (CRITICAL):**
1. **`projectId` (string - MANDATORY):** Numeric ID only.
2. **`selectedScreenIds` (array - MANDATORY):** Numeric screen IDs to vary.
3. **`variantOptions` (object - RECOMMENDED):** Controls variant generation.

projectId.description: Required. Numeric project ID only — do NOT include 'projects/' prefix.

selectedScreenIds.description: Required. Array of numeric screen IDs to generate variants from.

prompt.description: Optional. Guidance text for the variant direction.

variantOptions.description: Optional but recommended. Controls what and how much to vary.

modelId.description: Optional. GEMINI_3_1_PRO = latest Thinking model. GEMINI_3_PRO = deprecated (use 3_1_PRO). GEMINI_3_FLASH for speed.

creativeRange.description: How much to deviate from the original design.

outputComponents.description: Array of output components with generated variant screens.
